raw_text: $TSLA just crushed Q4 earnings! EPS beat by 30%, revenue up 25% YoY. Elon Musk hinting at major product announcements next quarter. Cybertruck production ramping faster than expected. Bulls are going absolutely wild! This is the TSLA we've been waiting for. 🚀

BREAKING: Goldman Sachs upgrades $NVDA to Strong Buy with $1,200 price target citing unprecedented AI chip demand. Data center revenue expected to triple in 2025. Jensen Huang's Blackwell architecture is changing everything. Institutional money is flooding in.

SEC 8-K Filing: Apple Inc. Apple discloses $90B expanded share buyback program in new 8-K filing. Tim Cook signals strong confidence in long-term growth trajectory as iPhone 16 demand exceeds forecasts in key markets.

BREAKING: Fed Chair Powell signals possible rate cut at next FOMC meeting, citing cooling CPI data and stabilizing labor market. Markets react immediately — $SPY spiking 1.8%, bond yields dropping. This is a major pivot signal. Buy the dip?

$META launches next-gen Llama 4 AI model, performance benchmarks beating GPT-4o on coding and reasoning tasks. Zuckerberg announces deep integration into WhatsApp and Instagram. Ad revenue guidance raised for Q1. Stock surging +8% in after-hours trading.
